purpose: Validate the built-in Codex-driven local translation pipeline on a public video clip.

source.note: Use only videos you own, are authorized to process, or are legally permitted to transform.

commands: logiccut translate-video --backend logiccut-local --input output/public-translation/download/source.mp4 --output-dir output/public-translation/translation --clip 90 --tgt-lang 中文

logiccut translate-video --backend logiccut-local --input output/public-translation/download/source.mp4 --output-dir output/public-translation/translation --translation-json output/public-translation/translation/translated_segments.json --clip 90 --tgt-lang 中文
acceptance_checks: The final video has one video stream and one audio stream.
The duration is close to 90 seconds.
Chinese subtitles are burned into the video.
No API key, cookies, model weights, or generated videos are committed.
